component.name: IptvLoadTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "execute" end sub
sub execute() request = m.top.request if request = invalid then m.top.response = Iptv_EmptyCatalogResponse("No provider was requested.") return end if
provider = invalid if request.DoesExist("provider") then provider = request.provider if provider = invalid then m.top.response = Iptv_EmptyCatalogResponse("No provider was requested.") return end if
m.top.response = IptvCatalogService_LoadProvider(provider) end sub
